markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss account balancing and team restructuring at GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=12.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Andi Bailey presented a preliminary account redistribution plan, focusing on minimal changes to strategic accounts](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [The plan involves reassigning some Managed Experts (MEs) and Customer Managers (CMs) to balance workloads and leverage individual strengths](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=149.0)
  - [Marcel Santilli requested clarification on the ME-to-director ratio and CM assignments](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [The meeting shifted to a more confidential discussion, with notetakers being removed](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)

## Topics

### Team Onboarding and Adaptation

  - [Andi Bailey is in her third week at the company, initially thinking it was her second](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=23.0)
  - [Jason Gong commended Andi's performance despite the learning curve](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=38.0)
  - [Andi described her approach as "throwing herself at things," indicating a proactive but potentially chaotic onboarding experience](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=42.0)

### Account Redistribution Strategy

  - [Andi created a document outlining proposed changes to account management](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Key principles:](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
      - [Minimal changes to successful strategic accounts](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=216.0)
      - [No alterations to Jason's existing accounts](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=160.0)
      - [Redistributing workload from Jacob, who has a heavy workload](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=166.0)
  - [Specific changes proposed:](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
      - [Moving David to work with Daryl on some accounts](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=174.0)
      - [Relocating Carrie to a new role](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Assigning Megan to manage Jesselyn and Vivek (leveraging Vivek's technical skills)](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
      - [Pairing Sidera (previously managed by Carrie) with Jesselyn for their combined experience](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)

### Team Structure and Roles

  - [Discussion revolves around MEs (Managed Experts), directors, and CMs (likely Customer Managers)](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=234.0)
  - [Some MEs currently manage 3-4 CMs](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [New MEs haven't been assigned in the current proposal](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Most CMs are staying with their current ME pairings, with some exceptions](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=262.0)

### Meeting Privacy

  - [Marcel requested the removal of notetakers, indicating a shift to more sensitive topics](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Review and refine Andi's proposed account redistribution plan](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Assign roles for new MEs not yet included in the current proposal](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Schedule a follow-up discussion on account health, as mentioned by Andi](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=223.0)
  - [Continue the meeting with a smaller, core group after removing notetakers for more confidential discussions](https://fathom.video/share/xefjvTGF3ksb2GE4_k3bakzwi8xdfgDz?tab=summary&timestamp=310.0)
